1LINE Farm

Run Farm →

What it does

Direction, not endless research.

Airdrop farming rewards focus, but most of the work is sifting — endless protocols, endless threads, endless noise about what's worth your time.

1LINE Farm reviews your farming objective and returns focused direction: potential opportunities, protocol observations, and clear priorities. Built for users who want a starting point rather than a research marathon. Intelligence only — no custody, no wallets, no keys. Not financial advice; airdrop outcomes are not guaranteed.

Example input

“I have $1,200 allocated for farming over the next 6 weeks and want the highest probability Ethereum or Base opportunities with realistic snapshot potential, low sybil risk and strong signs that the protocol is still rewarding active users rather than late farmers.”

Example process

Step 1 — Your goalDescribe your farming objective, set gas and chain preferences, and run the scan.

Step 2 — Highest-conviction matchReceive your highest-conviction opportunity and a personalised intelligence briefing.

Step 3 — Ranked intelligenceSee a ranked protocol snapshot — conviction, chains and snapshot signals.

An example of the Farm journey — goal, match, ranked intelligence.

What you receive

  • ✓ Opportunity analysis matched to your objective
  • ✓ Protocol observations and conviction signals
  • ✓ Priority ranking — where to focus first
  • ✓ Risk considerations
  • ✓ Suggested next actions

Try it first

You don't have to commit blind. Describe your objective and 1LINE Farm returns an initial farming observation for free — enough to gauge the depth of the read.

If it's useful, you can then choose to unlock the complete briefing. The teaser sets the expectation; the decision stays yours.

Describe your objective → See a free initial observation → Decide whether to unlock the complete briefing

Describe your objective. See where to focus.

One honest line is all it takes to start.
